# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Engine sync and memory fix**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 syncs upstream Skia m151 bug fixes and patches a native resource leak. The Skia engine is refreshed with Chrome m151 bug fixes, and a native handle leak in `SKImage.FromEncodedData` is resolved.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia m151 upstream bug fixes merged** — The bundled Skia engine is updated with bug fixes from the Chrome m151 branch. ([#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed** — Calling `SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI)` no longer leaks a native handle when the subset overload is used. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))
